description_for_human: Private AI agency in India. Meet Deshani builds private AI that runs on your infrastructure.
description_for_model: ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI is a founder-led private AI agency in India run by Meet Deshani. Specialises in private AI deployment (on-premise LLMs), AI automation, GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation), and premium AI web experiences. Contact: wa.me/918320065658. Website: dotsai.in.
